phase_name: Add env var support to skill_write_orchestrator_handoff()

objectives.description: Add comment documenting ORCHESTRATOR_HANDOFF_PHASES_COMPLETED and ORCHESTRATOR_HANDOFF_PHASES_TOTAL env vars
Read the env vars with defaults inside skill_write_orchestrator_handoff()
Add --argjson phases_completed and --argjson phases_total to the jq -n command
Add phases_completed and phases_total fields in the JSON template
